mapper.update: UPDATE chat_messages SET is_read = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE sender_id = #{senderId} AND receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT cm.*, CASE WHEN cm.sender_id = #{userId} THEN cm.receiver_id ELSE cm.sender_id END as other_user_id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CASE WHEN cm.sender_id = #{userId} THEN cm.receiver_id ELSE cm.sender_id END ORDER BY cm.created_at DESC ) as row_num FROM chat_messages cm WHERE (cm.sender_id = #{userId} OR cm.receiver_id = #{userId}) AND (cm.deleted IS NULL OR cm.deleted = 0) ) t WHERE t.row_num = 1 ORDER BY t.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_messages SET deleted = 1, deleted_at = NOW() WHERE (sender_id = #{userId} AND receiver_id = #{partnerId}) OR (sender_id = #{partnerId} AND receiver_id = #{userId})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_messages WHERE ((sender_id = #{userId} AND receiver_id = #{partnerId}) OR (sender_id = #{partnerId} AND receiver_id = #{userId})) AND (deleted IS NULL OR deleted = 0)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM chat_messages WHERE ((sender_id = #{userId} AND receiver_id = #{partnerId}) OR (sender_id = #{partnerId} AND receiver_id = #{userId}))
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM chat_messages WHERE ((sender_id = #{userId} AND receiver_id = #{partnerId}) OR (sender_id = #{partnerId} AND receiver_id = #{userId})) AND (deleted IS NULL OR deleted = 0) ORDER BY created_at ASC
